text: I am filled with a quiet curiosity as I step through the glass doors into a brightly lit, highly structured space. The letters "R+D" dominate the wall, signaling innovation and exploration. Yet, there is an uncanny sterility here. The words on the screen and wall seem to blur the line between human and machine, inviting contemplation. I feel like an observer and participant at once, questioning my own presence amid this showcase of research and development—a subtle sense of anticipation laced with mild detachment. Is this the future, or a carefully curated simulation of one?
